data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Insurance requirement verification,' but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or enforcement of this requirement. The linked use case mentions that an insurance certificate is required two weeks before the event, but there are no API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this requirement has been fulfilled or verified. This lack of evidence indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the verification of the insurance requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
